headline: Time Travel Tourism Agency Opens, Immediately Goes Bankrupt Due to Paradox Bookings
summary: Customers keep canceling trips to prevent their own existence.
fullBody: Temporal Vacations Inc. sold out its first season of trips to witness historic events, but 87% of bookings were retroactively canceled by time travelers preventing bad decisions. The CEO reportedly vanished mid-press conference. Remaining staff are stuck in an infinite loop of refunds.
